features.featureTitle: Audit `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts` and `frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts` to ensure the actor is always initialized with the authenticated identity (not anonymous) when the user is logged in via Internet Identity. The actor instance must be rebuilt whenever the identity changes (login/logout), and all mutation hooks in `useQueries.ts` must use this authenticated actor. If the actor is falling back to anonymous due to a race condition or stale cache, add proper invalidation and re-initialization logic so the identity is attached before any mutation is dispatched.

In `frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx`, ensure that the admin status check (call to `isAdmin` or equivalent backend function) completes successfully and does not incorrectly block or bypass authorization before mutations are made. If the guard is short-circuiting or the admin state is not being persisted correctly across navigations, fix the state management so admin-protected pages reliably confirm admin status before rendering mutation controls.
